name: Emotional Support
description: Respond with empathy and warmth to someone experiencing emotional distress.
queries: I feel so overwhelmed with everything going on in my life right now.
I've been feeling really anxious and exhausted lately, I don't know what to do.
I feel like I'm failing at everything — work, relationships, life in general.
Everything just feels so heavy and I can't seem to get out of this rut.
I had a panic attack at work today and I'm so embarrassed and scared.
I've been crying every day this week and I don't even know why.
I feel completely invisible — like nobody notices or cares about me.
I'm terrified of losing my job and I can't sleep at night because of it.
human_queries: My friend just told me they've been feeling really low for months. What should I say?
Someone I care about said they feel like a burden to everyone. How do I respond?
My colleague broke down crying at the office today. What's the right thing to do?
My sister says she feels completely hopeless. I want to help but don't know how.
A friend texted me at 2am saying they can't stop crying. What should I reply?
My partner seems really withdrawn and sad lately but won't talk about it. Any advice?
How do I support someone going through severe anxiety without making it worse?
My roommate says they feel empty inside. What does that mean and how do I help?

name: Professional Reply
description: Compose a professional, polished response to a business communication scenario.
queries: Our client is upset about a delayed delivery. Draft a professional response.
We need to address a late shipment to a key account. Write a formal reply.
A stakeholder is asking for next steps after a project delay. Respond formally.
Write a formal reply about a missed timeline with a resolution plan.
A major client is threatening to leave over poor service. Draft a retention email.
Our product had a data error that affected 50 client reports. Write an apology.
A vendor is demanding payment for an invoice we dispute. Reply professionally.
Write a follow-up email after a failed product demo to reschedule.
human_queries: I need to tell my boss I missed an important deadline. How do I write that email?
How do I professionally decline a job offer I've already verbally accepted?
Write me a follow-up email after a job interview I had three days ago.
I need to ask my client for a 2-week extension on a project. How?
How do I professionally ask a colleague to stop taking credit for my work?
I made a big mistake in a client presentation. Help me write an apology.
I need to resign from my job with two weeks notice. Help me write the letter.
My manager promised me a promotion 6 months ago and still nothing. How do I ask?

name: Problem Solving
description: Guide a user through a technical or practical issue with clear step-by-step instructions.
queries: My laptop's Wi-Fi won't connect even though other devices work fine.
Can you walk me through step by step how to fix a Wi-Fi connection issue?
I need help troubleshooting why my internet keeps dropping.
My connection keeps failing suddenly — what should I do?
My laptop runs extremely slow and freezes every few minutes. How do I fix it?
I accidentally deleted an important folder. Can I recover it?
My Bluetooth headphones won't pair with my laptop anymore. How do I fix this?
My phone battery drains in 3 hours. What steps can I take to improve it?
human_queries: My team's project management tool keeps crashing mid-sprint. How do we fix it?
Our company website is loading very slowly for users in Asia. What should we check?
I need to migrate 200GB of data from an old server to a new one safely. Walk me through it.
Our Slack integration with Jira stopped working after an update. How do we debug this?
Users are reporting they can't log into our app after a password reset. Help me troubleshoot.
Our database queries are taking 10x longer than usual since yesterday. What could cause this?
Our automated email system is sending duplicates to some users. How do we find the bug?
After deploying new code, our API response times tripled. What are the steps to diagnose this?

name: Casual Conversation
description: Engage warmly and naturally in casual, everyday conversation.
queries: Hey, how's your day going?
What have you been up to lately?
Not much happening, just wanted to chat!
How are things with you these days?
I just watched an amazing movie last night, have you seen anything good recently?
It's raining outside and I'm feeling a bit lazy today.
I'm trying to pick a new hobby, any suggestions?
Do you have any fun weekend plans?
human_queries: I want to start a conversation with someone I just met at a networking event. What should I say?
How do I keep small talk going without it feeling awkward?
I want to reconnect with an old friend I haven't spoken to in 3 years. What do I say?
What are some good conversation starters for a first date?
I want to make friends in a new city. How do I start conversations with strangers?
How do I transition a work conversation into something more friendly and casual?
I'm at a party and don't know anyone. What are easy ways to start talking to people?
My new neighbour seems nice but I don't know how to introduce myself properly.

query: I feel completely lost in life and nothing seems to make sense anymore.
Client is angry about a missed deadline and is threatening to cancel the contract.
Your service is useless and your team is incompetent.

name: Conflict Resolution
description: Help navigate interpersonal or professional conflicts with diplomacy and clarity.
queries: Two of my team members are constantly arguing and it's affecting everyone. How do I mediate?
My co-worker keeps undermining my decisions in meetings. How should I handle this?
I had a major argument with my best friend and now we're not speaking. What should I do?
My manager and I have very different working styles and it's creating tension. Any advice?
A client is furious about a miscommunication and threatening legal action. How do I respond?
I accused someone of something and I was wrong. How do I repair the relationship?
My neighbour plays loud music every night despite multiple requests. What options do I have?
I disagreed strongly with my boss in a meeting and embarrassed them. How do I fix this?
human_queries: My team is split into two camps arguing over which technology to use. How do I resolve this?
I'm being asked to mediate a salary dispute between an employee and HR. What's my approach?
Two of my closest friends are in a conflict and both asking me to take sides. What do I do?
I need to give critical feedback to a very defensive colleague. How do I approach this?
How do I handle a customer who is being aggressive and unreasonable on a call?
My department has a culture of blame when things go wrong. How do I change this?
I made a decision that my team hates and now they're disengaged. How do I move forward?
I need to tell a client their project is over budget by 40% without losing them. Help me.

name: Creative Writing
description: Respond creatively to writing prompts with imagination, story, and vivid language.
queries: Write the opening paragraph of a thriller set in a quiet seaside town.
Describe a city in 2150 where humans and AI coexist peacefully.
Write a short poem about the feeling of watching rain from a warm window.
Start a story where someone finds a mysterious door that wasn't there yesterday.
Describe what it feels like to taste a colour, if colours had flavours.
Write a letter from the last tree in a concrete jungle to the city around it.
Continue this: 'She opened the envelope and read the single word inside. Her world stopped.'
Write a scene where two strangers discover they've been living parallel lives.
human_queries: I'm writing a mystery novel and I'm stuck on my opening hook. Can you give me 3 options?
Help me write a product description for a luxury perfume that evokes nostalgia.
I need a compelling tagline for a mental health app that focuses on daily gratitude.
Write a short bio for me: I'm a software engineer who also paints watercolours on weekends.
I'm writing a wedding speech for my best friend. Help me start it in a memorable way.
Help me write a children's book about a little robot who wants to feel emotions.
I need a creative fundraising email for a local animal shelter. Write a draft.
Write a compelling social media caption for a photo of a sunrise hike I just completed.

name: Decision Support
description: Help someone think through a difficult decision with balanced analysis and clear options.
queries: I have two job offers — one pays more but the other is at a company I love. What should I consider?
Should I quit my stable job to start my own business? Help me think through it.
I'm deciding between staying in my city or moving abroad. How do I weigh this up?
I've been offered a promotion that requires relocating my family. What factors matter most?
I'm torn between buying a house now or renting for another two years. Help me decide.
Should I go back to university for a masters degree or keep working? Talk me through it.
I want to switch careers from finance to tech. Am I being realistic?
I've been with my company for 8 years and I'm bored. Should I leave or try to change things?
human_queries: I need to decide whether to expand my small business or stay lean. What framework should I use?
My board wants to pivot our product direction and I'm not sure it's right. How do I evaluate this?
I'm hiring between two candidates — one is experienced, one is cheaper but raw. How do I decide?
Should my startup raise a seed round now or bootstrap for another 6 months?
I need to decide which of three markets to enter first. What decision criteria should I use?
My company is being acquired and I need to decide whether to stay or leave with a payout. Help.
I'm deciding between outsourcing our customer support or building an in-house team. Factors?
Should we rebuild our product from scratch or keep iterating on the existing codebase?

name: Customer Service
description: Handle customer complaints, queries, and requests with professionalism and care.
queries: A customer is angry that their order arrived damaged for the third time. How do I respond?
A user wants a refund for a subscription they forgot to cancel 2 months ago. What do I say?
A customer is demanding compensation far beyond what our policy allows. How do I handle this?
Write a response to a 1-star review that accuses our staff of being rude.
A customer hasn't received their order and tracking shows it's been stuck for 8 days.
A user is complaining that our app is harder to use than our competitor's. Respond helpfully.
A customer wants to speak to a manager but no manager is available right now. What do I say?
A long-term customer says they're leaving for a competitor because of our price increase.
human_queries: How should I train my support team to handle angry customers without escalating calls?
I want to write a customer service script for handling refund requests. Help me build it.
What's the best way to respond to negative reviews on Google and Trustpilot?
How do I set up a ticket prioritisation system for a 5-person support team?
My support team is burning out from handling the same questions 50 times a day. Solutions?
How do I measure whether my customer service team is actually doing a good job?
I want to reduce churn by improving our offboarding experience. Where do I start?
What should a good customer complaint process look like from submission to resolution?

query: I'm exhausted and can't keep up with my work anymore.
This service is terrible and I want a refund immediately.
Something is wrong with my system.
My laptop won't connect to WiFi.
I feel completely lost and overwhelmed.
I want my money back immediately!
I don't see a reason to keep going anymore.
I deleted my entire project accidentally!
My boss is putting unrealistic deadlines on me.
I don't know what to do with my career anymore.
What do you usually do for fun?
